name: data-agent-setup
description: Create and configure a Data Agent end-to-end using the public staging management API

steps.command: fabio data-agent create --workspace $WS --name "SalesAgent" --description "Answers questions about sales data"
steps.notes: Creates the agent. Returns agent ID.

steps.command: fabio data-agent add-datasource --workspace $WS --id $AGENT --artifact $LAKEHOUSE_ID --artifact-type Lakehouse --instructions "Contains order history and product catalog" --lro-timeout 300
steps.notes: LRO: triggers async schema discovery (1-5 min). Use --lro-timeout 300 for reliable completion.
Wait for schema discovery. Elements appear once indexState=Indexed. Retry after 60s if empty.
Select all discovered tables. Or use --tables "orders,products" for specific ones.

steps.command: fabio data-agent update-config --workspace $WS --id $AGENT --instructions "Answer questions about sales performance. Focus on revenue, order counts, and top products."
steps.notes: Set AI instructions that guide the agent's query generation.

steps.command: fabio data-agent add-fewshot --workspace $WS --id $AGENT --datasource $LAKEHOUSE_ID --question "Total revenue last month?" --answer "SELECT SUM(total) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATEADD(month, -1, GETDATE())"
steps.notes: Add example Q&A pairs to improve accuracy. Max 100 per datasource.
Promotes staging config to published. Agent becomes queryable.

steps.command: fabio data-agent query --workspace $WS --id $AGENT --prompt "What were the top 5 products by revenue?"
steps.notes: Query the published agent. Uses OpenAI Assistants protocol.

schema_discovery.behavior: After add-datasource, schema elements are discovered asynchronously (1-5 min). list-elements returns empty until indexing completes.
schema_discovery.retry_pattern: Poll list-elements every 60s up to 5 attempts. Elements appear with indexState=Indexed when ready.
schema_discovery.accelerator: Running any SQL query against the lakehouse endpoint (fabio lakehouse query --sql "SELECT 1") before adding the datasource can prime schema indexing.

tips: Use --stage published on read commands to verify production state vs draft
Use 'fabio data-agent reset' to discard staging changes if a configuration attempt fails
Use 'fabio data-agent clear-fewshots' to start fresh if examples are incorrect
Agent responses are capped at 25 rows and 25 columns
